sourcesContent:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {ref, computed} from "vue";
import FlowDrawerFooter from '@/views/workflow/plugin/common/DrawerFooter.vue';
import AuthForm from '@/views/workflow/plugin/common/AuthForm.vue';
import FlowNodeApproval from '@/views/workflow/plugin/preps/utils/Approval.vue';
import FlowNodeCopyerConfigure from '@/views/workflow/plugin/preps/utils/CopyerConfigure.vue';
import {useFlowDesign} from "@/store/FlowDesignStore.ts";
import piniaInstance from "@/store";
import {ModelRef} from "vue-demi";

defineOptions({
  name: 'CopyerPrep',
})
let node: ModelRef<any> = defineModel("activeData");
let copyerTab = ref<string>("1");

const flowDesign = useFlowDesign(piniaInstance);
const flowFormInfo = computed(() => flowDesign.flowFormInfo);
const onClose = () => {
  flowDesign.setActive(false);
}
/**
 * 保存配置
 */
const onSave = () => {
  // 更新节点显示信息
  let content = '';
  node.value.approveGroups.forEach((group: any) => {
    if (Array.isArray(group.approverNames) && group.approverNames.length > 0) {
      content += group.approverNames.join(',');
    } else {
      content += group.approverNames;
    }
    if (content) {
      content += ',';
    }
  });
  if (!content && node.value.operations?.customCc) {
    //  是否设置发起人填写
    content += '发起人填写';
  }
  onClose();
}

</script>
<template>
  <el-form v-model="node" label-position="top" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:47:3">
    <el-tabs v-model="copyerTab" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:48:5">
      <el-tab-pane key="1" name="1" label="抄送设置" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:49:7">
        <el-form-item label="抄送人" prop="approveGroups" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:50:9">
          <FlowNodeApproval :groups="node.approveGroups" :node="node" title="抄送人" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:51:11"/>
        </el-form-item>
        <el-form-item label="密送人" prop="secretApproveGroups" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:53:9">
          <FlowNodeApproval :groups="node.secretApproveGroups" :node="node" title="密送人" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:54:11"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-tab-pane>
      <el-tab-pane key="2" name="2" label="表单权限" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:57:7">
        <el-form-item label="表单权限" prop="privilege" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:58:9">
          <AuthForm v-model="node.privilege" :form-id="flowFormInfo?.formId" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:59:11"/>
        </el-form-item>
      </el-tab-pane>
      <el-tab-pane key="3" name="3" label="高级设置" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:62:7">
        <FlowNodeCopyerConfigure v-model="node.operations" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:63:9"/>
      </el-tab-pane>
    </el-tabs>
  </el-form>
  <FlowDrawerFooter @close="onClose" @save="onSave" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/CopyerPrep.vue:67:3"/>
</template>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
:deep(.el-form-item__label) {
  font-weight: 800;
}
</style>

transforms.name: vite:css-post
unplugin-vue-components
vite:import-analysis
